title: Different Author Basic
description: The protected baseline uses layered reflective cadence while the protected output uses terse operational prose. The fixture should keep local claims bounded while showing lower protected-baseline contact than the same-author pressure case.

inputs.protectedBaseline: The archive keeps asking for a witness, and the witness keeps turning into a room with too many doors. I write in loops because the record arrives in loops; each clause returns to check whether the first door is still locked.
inputs.maskReference: Send the packet. Keep the chain clean. Mark the exhibit and stop there. No flourish, no loop, no extra heat.
inputs.messageDraft: Please send EXHIBIT-42 with the custody note attached before 6/13, and keep the packet marked for local review only.
inputs.protectedOutput: Send EXHIBIT-42 before 6/13. Attach the custody note. Mark the packet for local review only. Keep the chain clean.

calibrationNotes: This fixture guards against inflating protected-baseline contact when cadence, punctuation, and sentence topology diverge.
Claims remain local even when distance appears favorable.
